sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n28185" key="doulopo/nhros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δουλο-πόνηρος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n28185.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">bad like a slave's,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">κόλυθρον</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0510.tlg001:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Telecl.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
